chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI Constitutional Petition No. D-3784 of 2024 Date Order with signature of Judge(s) 1. For order on Misc. No.16490/2024 (Exemption) 2. For order on Misc. No.16491/2025 (Stay) 3. For hearing of main case 15.10.2025 None present for the petitioner -------------------------------- This case was taken up one year ago. In the last one year, learned counsel for the petitioner has failed to pursue this petition diligently. Today, despite the name of the petitioner’s counsel appeared in the cause list, none present for the petitioner without intimation. It appears that the petitioner has lost interest in pursuing this petition, which is accordingly dismissed for non-prosecution alongwith listed applications. HEAD OF CONST. BENCHES JUDGE Zahid/*
